markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance and strategize for the upcoming e-staff review.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI Visibility Up:** Redis's AI competitive presence rose from 44% to 50% (Scrunch data), a key metric for the e-staff review.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Content Backlog Cleared:** 49 articles are now published; only 4 remain in PMM review, assigned to Jim.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**New CTA Strategy:** To drive hand-raisers, the team will test placing CTAs mid-article, moving beyond the current bottom-of-page placement.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Bot Traffic Identified:** A surge in direct traffic was confirmed as bot activity (from Singapore/China, 1366x1366 screen res) and will be filtered from reports.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

## Topics

### AI Visibility & Reporting

  - [**Goal:** Generate impressive insights for the upcoming e-staff review.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [**Key Metric:** AI competitive presence increased from 44% to 50% (Scrunch data).](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX launched "Check That," an internal tool replacing Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [**Vision:** A shared prompt library with historical data for easy setup.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Status:** In a 90-day trial with known bugs (e.g., jumbled data after category switches).](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
      - [**Action:** Erik will use Scrunch data for the e-staff report while Check That is debugged.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Publishing Cadence:** 49 articles published; 4 remain in PMM review (assigned to Jim).](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic:** Shows a healthy, compounding week-over-week growth trend.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [**Bot Traffic:** A recent surge in direct traffic was identified as bot activity.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Source:** Singapore & China.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [**Signature:** Screen resolution 1366x1366, 1-2 second engagement time.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will use this info to filter data; Fung-Lin shared a Google support post on the issue.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** ChatGPT drives \~90% of all LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**Conversions:** GrowthX articles have not yet generated hand-raisers.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Hand-raisers originate from product/docs pages, not blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Solution:** Test placing CTAs mid-article to capture intent earlier.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
      - [Compile an AI visibility summary for the e-staff review.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [Share bot traffic details with the GrowthX engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Fung-Lin:**](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
      - [Ping Jim to complete PMM review for the 4 remaining articles.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
      - [Discuss mid-article CTA design with the brand team.](https://fathom.video/share/v3je9vmSPwoWdD9XTkiHDRoEMJDm4v2a?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
